holdings.infoBox: ASEA is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Global X FTSE Southeast Asia ETF (ASEA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE/ASEAN 40 INDEX index. The fund tracks a market-cap weighted and -selected index of the 40 largest and most liquid stocks from Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand and the Philippines. ASEA was launched on Feb 17, 2011 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: There Will Be Investing Opportunities When the Strait of Hormuz Reopens. Think ETFs.
data.text: The war's end would help China. Two quick ways to tap Chinese stocks: the iShares MSCI China ETF and the iShares MSCI China A-shares ETF.

data.title: Philippine Stocks Reclaim Pre-COVID High After Rate Cut
data.text: Philippine stocks rocketed to a nine-month high after a shock interest rate cut. Gain exposure to the country's stocks with these ETFs.
